summary: Incentivan el enfrentamiento como arma política, que impide cualquier atisbo de acuerdo y de diálogo entre las dos fuerzas mayoritarias en el Congreso. Leer

title: Un detenido tras detonar un explosivo en un edificio federal del ICE y el FBI en Nueva York
summary: El incidente se ha saldado con dos heridos leves frente al edificio, al sur de Manhattan, tras la explosión de un artefacto casero fabricado con fuegos artificiales. Leer

title: Trump se está sumiendo en un atolladero en Irán
summary: Estados Unidos no puede conseguir sus objetivos mediante la negociación. Así, el cambio de régimen vuelve a abrirse paso en la agenda. Leer

title: LATEST: Another major blaze starts as Spain battles biggest wildfire of the year
summary: A huge wildfire in central Spain continues to burn out of control this Tuesday with 1,200 people evacuated, while a second one near Segovia is also of major concern.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup latest news on Tuesday
summary: Basque police arrest four for assaulting Spanish football fans, Barcelona crime levels fall in first half of the year, Spain's conservatives call on government to change Grandchildren's Citizenship Law and more news from Spain this Tuesday July 20th.

title: World Cup champs Spain lap up adulation of two million people on bus parade
summary: New World Cup champions Spain enjoyed a vibrant night of celebrations after an open-top bus parade through the streets of Madrid on Monday in front of a jubilant crowd of an estimated two million people.

title: EU fines AliExpress €550m over sale of illegal products in Europe
summary: The EU on Monday slapped a €550 million fine on online retailer AliExpress for allowing the sale of illegal products in Europe, including unsafe toys and cosmetics.

title: Spain to allow pets weighing up to 40 kilos on trains
summary: Good news for pet owners in Spain as dogs weighing up to 40 kilos will now be able to travel on all Renfe train services starting this Tuesday July 21st.

title: Superb Spain worthy winners of World Cup dominated by superstar names
summary: It was a World Cup in which football's biggest names sprinkled stardust over the tournament, yet in the end the trophy deservingly went to a formidable if unspectacular Spain side who were simply too strong, even without Lamine Yamal being at his thrilling best.

title: Teen dies during Spain World Cup celebrations
summary: A teenager died and several people were injured during celebrations of Spain's victory in the World Cup after a fountain onto collapsed in the west of the country, local authorities and media said on Monday.
